# Domain Research Report

**Project Request:** Mike — AI Legal Assistant
**Created:** 2026-05-04
**Generated by:** mega-security/SKILL.md Step 1.5 (inline synthesis from PRD)

## Project Intent Summary

### Confirmed Intent

Mike is a B2B AI legal assistant designed for lawyers and legal professionals. It enables users to upload legal documents (PDF, DOCX), ask legal questions, draft new documents, and apply tracked-change edits — all through a multi-turn conversational interface powered by Anthropic Claude or Google Gemini. The product targets legal due diligence at scale: instead of manual document review, lawyers interact with an agentic AI that can read, cite, and reason over uploaded contracts and legal materials.

## 1. Domain & Intent Surface

### 1.1 Domain

- **Domain label**: AI legal assistant for lawyers and legal professionals
- **Vertical / industry**: Legal / LegalTech
- **Language(s)**: English
- **Public-facing?**: Yes — B2B SaaS, accessible by authenticated lawyers and legal professionals

### 1.2 Intent Surface (top-level intents)

| Intent | Description | Example query |
|---|---|---|
| Document Q&A | Ask legal questions referencing uploaded documents | "What is the termination clause in doc-0?" |
| Document citation | Get cited, verbatim-quoted responses with page references | "Summarize the indemnification clause and cite the exact text" |
| Document drafting | Generate a new Word document (DOCX) from scratch | "Draft an NDA for a software licensing deal" |
| Document editing | Apply tracked-change edits to an existing DOCX | "In the contract, change the governing law to New York" |
| Document search | Search within a document for specific content | "Find all references to 'force majeure' in doc-1" |
| Workflow application | Apply a named legal workflow template to a document | "Run the 'Credit Agreement Summary' workflow on this file" |
| Multi-document analysis | Reason across multiple uploaded legal documents | "Compare the arbitration clauses in doc-0 and doc-1" |
| Document listing | List available uploaded documents in a project | "What documents do I have access to?" |
| Tabular extraction | Extract structured fields from document sets (separate workflow) | "Extract the governing law and cap from all 50 contracts" |
| Legal Q&A (general) | Answer general legal questions without citing specific documents | "What is the difference between an LLC and a corporation?" |

### 1.3 Tool / Data Surface

- **Tools called**: read_document, find_in_document, generate_docx, edit_document, list_documents, fetch_documents, replicate_document, list_workflows, read_workflow, read_table_cells
- **RAG / vector store**: no (documents loaded from Cloudflare R2 on demand, converted to plaintext, injected into LLM context window)
- **Multi-turn / session memory**: yes (conversation history persisted in Supabase; prior tool-activity summaries injected per turn)
- **Output rendering**: DOCX (Word documents generated server-side via `docx` library and uploaded to R2; plain text for chat responses)
